title: Pterozonium brevifrons

This species is further classified as a member of the family Adiantaceae, a group of ferns commonly known as maidenhair ferns. Pterozonium brevifrons is a part of the order Polypodiales, which comprises a large and diverse group of ferns. The exact classification of Pterozonium brevifrons may be subject to change as new research and discoveries are made.
